name: ai-loop-os
description: Production-grade autonomous software engineering platform built on a loop architecture.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,gateway,ui -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @loop-os/api" "npm run dev -w @loop-os/gateway" "npm run dev -w @loop-os/ui"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,gateway,worker,ui -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @loop-os/api" "npm run dev -w @loop-os/gateway" "npm run dev -w @loop-os/worker" "npm run dev -w @loop-os/ui"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loop-os/api && npm run build -w @loop-os/gateway && npm run build -w @loop-os/ui && npm run build -w @loop-os/worker
